【斩神同人】＋【崩坏】＋【十三英桀】
穿越到斩神的世界，并且还随着父母搬家到沧南市的方佑表示自己很慌。
要是一个不小心就喂了鬼面人的肚子咋办？
然而，随着他踏下列车，站在苍南市的土地上的时候，他的耳边回响起了一个少女的声音，她自称爱莉希雅，是无瑕的少女。
“嗨，你好呀！”
“我叫爱莉希雅，你也可以叫我粉色妖精小姐♪”
于是，为了帮助爱莉希雅唤醒她的伙伴，也为了能获在这个危机四伏的世界中拥有站稳脚跟的力量，方佑决定尝试接触这个世界的主角——林七夜。
我将鏖集十三英桀，远征讨伐诸神。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7a9024ec7833b2f0034262704688b7c1","author":"要从云上来","author_id":"","book_id":"7485758953989606462","book_name":"斩神：开门，逐火英桀送温暖","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#b8b8c8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1062,"name":"斩神衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1062&name=斩神衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7485765285178262078","read_count":"19055","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1870094"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"910","tags":"男频衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,斩神衍生,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a30792cccbf838788f4e300a321fcff2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779440793&x-signature=kmgy0rENmEc6uaKz6jSIpsKGU%2Bw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3175014616539230","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"77"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032317063392C8DE797353130566E3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0
